title: carex ledebouriana subsp. tenuiformis
intro: Carex ledebouriana subsp. tenuiformis, also known as Chinese ledebour's sedge, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Carex ledebouriana subsp. tenuiformis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to improve digestion and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
